specific_mechanism: new braid-group cross-attention module introducing new learnable braid parameters and new permutation bridge (new computation graph edges)
llm_application: new braid-group cross-attention module: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new learnable braid parameters) implementing new braid-group cross-attention module; the module adds new permutation bridge between existing layers, creating new cross-attention pathway that the baseline lacks; module is NOT a function of existing parameters
